basic_details.job_title: Anna University System Administrator / Office Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Anna University Recruitment 2026: Anna University has released the official notification for 2 System Administrator / Office Assistant posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid education jobs.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: System Administrator: B.E./B.Tech./M.E./M.Tech. in Computer Science / Information Technology / Electronics & Communication / Artificial Intelligence & Data Science or related disciplines. For Office Assistant: Minimum qualification: Pass in 8th Standard.
qualification.details: System Administrator: B.E./B.Tech./M.E./M.Tech. in Computer Science / Information Technology / Electronics & Communication / Artificial Intelligence & Data Science or related disciplines. Experience in GPU server management, Linux administration, networking, AI/ML computing environments, and system maintenance is desirable. Knowledge in CUDA, virtualization, cloud platforms, and AI infrastructure management will be preferred. Office Assistant: Minimum qualification: Pass in 8th Standard from a recognized school/institution. Good communication and administrative skills. Knowledge in MS Office, documentation, office administration, and record maintenance is desirable.

salary_details.pay_scale: System Administrator: Rs. 40,000/- per month (Consolidated), Office Assistant: Rs. 20,000/- per month (Consolidated)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Anna University Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 08-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Anna University Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the System Administrator and Office Assistant positions at Anna University is 08 June 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the System Administrator post?
faq.answer: For the System Administrator role, candidates need a B.E./B.Tech./M.E./M.Tech. in Computer Science, Information Technology, Electronics & Communication, or Artificial Intelligence & Data Science, or related fields.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification for the Office Assistant position?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification for the Office Assistant post is a pass in the 8th Standard from a recognized school or institution.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the System Administrator position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the System Administrator post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 40,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for the Office Assistant role?
faq.answer: The Office Assistant position offers a consolidated salary of Rs. 20,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for these positions at Anna University?
faq.answer: Applications can be submitted via email or offline post. You need to send your detailed resume along with self-attested copies of relevant documents.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: Anna University is recruiting for a total of 2 vacancies, comprising one System Administrator and one Office Assistant.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for these temporary positions will involve a written test followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where should I send my application?
faq.answer: Applications should be sent to The Head of the Department, Department of Electronics and Communication Engineering, College of Engineering Guindy, Anna University, Chennai-600025.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any specific mention for experience for the Office Assistant post?
faq.answer: While a formal experience is not strictly mandated, good communication and administrative skills, along with knowledge of MS Office and office administration, are desirable for the Office Assistant role.
